title: Encryption Architecture Whitepaper
excerpt: AES-256-GCM encryption at rest. AWS KMS managed keys; BYOK via customer CMK in customer's AWS account with key-policy binding. Key rotation: annual by default, on-demand via KMS API. TLS 1.2+ in transit with PFS (ECDHE cipher suites), HSTS one-year max-age, TLS 1.0/1.1 disabled.
